whatIsTestAS.label: Smart Preparation
whatIsTestAS.title: Why Choose KNI?
whatIsTestAS.subtitle: The key to unlocking your dream university with confidence

crucial.title: Crucial for Success
crucial.description: TestAS is essential to ensure you get accepted into your dream university.

difficulty.title: Unexpected Difficulty
difficulty.description: 90% of test-takers realize TestAS is much harder than expected when they enter the exam room.

sample.title: Sample vs. Reality
sample.description: Official sample questions are far too easy compared to the actual TestAS exam.

trusted.title: Trusted by Top Students
trusted.description: KNI has successfully guided students with a 9.5 GPA and IELTS scores of 7.0–8.0.

preparation.title: Preparation Is Key
preparation.description: Don’t face a life-changing exam unprepared—studying the right way makes all the difference.

competition.title: Outshine the Competition
competition.description: Dedicated preparation with KNI helps you surpass others and seize top opportunities.

preparation.label: Preparation Guide
preparation.title: So, How Will You Prepare for TestAS?

0.title: Self-Study
0.description_1: It’s fine, but only if you already have IELTS 7.5 or German C1.
0.description_2: You have specialized knowledge and vocabulary in English or German, not just conversational language skills.
0.description_3: You don’t have to balance time with other subjects.
0.description_4: You have plenty of opportunities to retake TestAS multiple times.

1.title: Using Online Materials
1.description_1: You found a Preparation for TestAS book and think it’s the answer to everything?
1.description_2: Let me tell you, if you buy books from 2017 to 2025, 99% of the content remains the same. They only change the year to avoid copyright issues.
1.description_3: Even if you memorize every word in that book… you’ll soon realize how different it is from the actual exam.

2.title: Studying at a Study Abroad Center?
2.description_1: You mean the place where they reteach what’s in the Preparation for TestAS book?
2.description_2: If you need study abroad advice, find a study abroad expert.
2.description_3: But if you need a high TestAS score, you’ll need a TestAS specialist.

tutor.label: Since 2024
tutor.title: Your Companion on This Journey

description.item1: Former VGU MEN Student, Class of 18-22

tutor.quote: I believe that education in Germany is the best opportunity for Vietnamese students’ future careers due to its global quality and near-zero tuition fees. That’s why I strive to bring the best opportunities to the most determined young people with this goal.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: At KNI Education, accessible from kni.vn, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by KNI Education and how we use it.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.p1: When you sign up for a free consultation, trial lesson, or download our TestAS practice tests, we collect the personal information you provide to us. This includes:
section1.li4: How you found us (referred, social media, etc.)
section1.p2: We do not collect any sensitive payment information or tracking data beyond standard web analytics.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.p1: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:
section2.li1: Send you the requested TestAS practice materials and updates.
section2.li2: Contact you via Zalo/phone/email to schedule free consultation calls or trial lessons.
section2.li3: Provide, operate, and maintain our website and services.
section2.li4: Improve, personalize, and expand our website and educational offerings.
section2.li5: Understand and analyze how you use our website.

section3.title: 3. Data Security and Third-Party Services
section3.p1: We value your trust in providing us your personal information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. We use third-party services such as Brevo to handle and store your contact information for sending automated emails. We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to outside parties.

section4.title: 4. Cookies and Web Beacons
section4.p1: Like any other website, KNI Education uses 'cookies'. These cookies are used to store information including visitors' preferences, and the pages on the website that the visitor accessed or visited. The information is used to optimize the users' experience by customizing our web page content based on visitors' browser type and/or other information.
section4.p2: We also use Google Analytics (G-22N9GX8CS1) to measure how users interact with our site content. You can choose to disable cookies through your individual browser options.

section5.title: 5. Your Data Protection Rights
section5.p1: We want to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following:
section5.li1: The right to access – You have the right to request copies of your personal data.
section5.li2: The right to rectification – You have the right to request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate.
section5.li3: The right to erasure – You have the right to request that we erase your personal data under certain conditions.
section5.li4: The right to restrict processing – You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data.

section6.title: 6. Contact Us
section6.p1: If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us:
section6.li3: Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

MentorPage.heroSubtitle: TestAS Instructor · VGU MEN Alumni · TestAS 125/130
MentorPage.heroImageAlt: Nhật - TestAS Instructor at KNI Education
MentorPage.bioDesc: I'm Nhật, graduated from Van Lang University (VGU) MEN class of 18-22. During my 4 years at university, I received consecutive scholarships at 50-50-100-50% levels. I then continued studying robotics engineering at ABB and scored 125/130 on the TestAS exam.
MentorPage.philosophyQuote: I believe that education in Germany is the best opportunity for Vietnamese students' future careers due to its global quality and near-zero tuition fees. That's why I strive to bring the best opportunities to the most determined young people with this goal.
MentorPage.why2: Deep understanding of exam structure and format
MentorPage.why3: Personal experience studying and living in Germany
MentorPage.ctaSubtitle: Sign up for a free trial to experience Nhật's teaching method and receive a personalized TestAS preparation roadmap.
